mapper.select: SELECT rp.id AS recent_property_id, p.id AS property_id, p.property_type, p.name, p.sgg_cd, p.umd_nm, p.jibun, p.build_year, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.latest_sale_price, p.latest_deposit, p.latest_monthly_rent, rp.last_deal_type, rp.last_deal_id, rp.view_count, rp.updated_at AS viewed_at FROM recent_property rp JOIN property p ON p.id = rp.property_id WHERE rp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY rp.updated_at DESC, rp.id DESC LIMIT 30
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recent_property ( user_id, property_id, last_deal_type, last_deal_id, view_count ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{propertyId}, #{lastDealType}, #{lastDealId}, 1 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_deal_type = VALUES(last_deal_type), last_deal_id = VALUES(last_deal_id), view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
